title: July 31st, 2021 (2)
body:
- #professional
    - i jumped into the middle of a story lyrics
        - i jumped into the middle of a story
        - cuz i was doing something boring
        - i remembered a bit about what you told me
        - it all came up dolled up when i was lonely
        - everything i thought of was strangely new to me
    - in my yard is a dragon lyrics
        - in my yard is a dragon
        - looks like a tree when it's blazing
        - it burst up out of the pavement
        - it's birth causing a cave-in
        - that's what i mean when i say
        - this e[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]h can barely contain the amazement
        - on the ground all around
        - all the gold that it's garden
        - bark emblazoned and hardened
        - as if someone would dare to come harm them
        - i was in awe of it all
        - what a magnificent monster
        - i saw what i saw
        - so i let it be what it wants to
